sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 12.50 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.12)

statement.latex: (Well-known problem). Find an algorithm which decides, by a given finite set of matrices in$SL_3({ Z})$, whether the first matrix of this set is contained in the subgroup generated by the remaining matrices. An analogous problem for$SL_4({ Z})$is insoluble since a direct product of two free groups of rank 2 embeds into$SL_4({ Z})$.

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
